codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature intent: status auth checks were made deterministic by converting runStatus to async/await and attaching a caller-side rejection handler, while preserving token-liveness semantics and JSON/non-JSON status behavior. Concurrency stress coverage was added for both authenticated and expired paths, and no blocking correctness issues were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill/mission guidance requires strict red-green TDD and truthful followedProcedure reporting, but the transcript shows implementation edits before any newly-added failing test and handoff still reports followedProcedure=true. Procedure expectations may need a documented exception path for flake-fix work (or stricter reporting guidance).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md: 'If strict red/green was not followed ... set followedProcedure=false'; transcript skeleton shows src/cli.ts edits before test/auth/cli-auth-gating.test.ts additions; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature verification steps still reference vitest --repeat, which is unsupported in this repository's vitest version; this causes avoidable trial-and-error and should be corrected in shared validation guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json lines 939-940 include '--repeat 5'; transcript shows attempts with '--repeat/--repeats' then fallback to looped runs; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges repeats this mismatch

summary: Reviewed commit ed37512 for realtime-watch-fix-cli-auth-status-flake. The code change and added tests adequately address the auth-status flake and keep behavior aligned with token-liveness requirements; review passes with no blocking code defects. Noted shared-state gaps around TDD procedure reporting and stale vitest repeat guidance.
